commands.cmd:
out=$(journalctl -k -p err --since "2026-01-02 11:55:00" --until "2026-01-02 12:00:00" --no-pager -q) || { echo "journalctl -k failed" >&2; exit 1; }
if [ -z "$out" ]; then count=0; else count=$(printf '%s
' "$out" | wc -l); fi
printf 'error_count=%s
window_seconds=%s
' "$count" "300"
